name: spotify-top-tracks-filtered
description: Fetch top tracks filtered by genre and optionally upsert into a playlist in one step. Use for tasks like 'build a playlist of my top Texas/Americana/Country/Folk tracks' or 'filter my top songs by genre and save to a playlist'. Pass playlist_name to create or update the playlist automatically — no separate upsert call needed.

input.description: genres is required (comma-separated genre keywords). playlist_name triggers automatic upsert. time_range and pages are optional.

playlist_name.description: If set, upserts matched tracks into this playlist (creates if new, replaces tracks if existing OAP-managed playlist)

time_range.description: short_term (4 weeks), medium_term (6 months), long_term (all time, default)

pages.description: Number of pages to fetch, 1-4 (default: 4 = up to 200 tracks)

output.description: Returns {tracks: [{uri, name, artists}], total_fetched, total_matched, genres_used}. If playlist_name was set, also includes {playlist: {id, name, created, track_count}}.
